_comment: Per-machine example for wiring smalltalk's session boundary hooks into a Claude Code agent. Drop this at the agent repo's .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored), swap the absolute paths to your smalltalk checkout, and the agent will run the boot ritual on every session boundary + surface API-error wedges to myobie via smalltalk. See README.md in this directory for what each hook does and why all three are needed.
